case_title: IAN MACKINLEY ARCHITECTURE, INC. VS WELCH, MICHAEL T.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,283.03 FILED BY IAN MACKINLEY ARCHITECTURE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WELCH, MICHAEL T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PARTY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELCH, MICHAEL T. THE TERMS & CONDITIONS OF THE EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PLTF & DEFT DATED 11/11/02 & SIGNED BY DEFT ON 2/21/03 INDICATE IN SECT. F:".. SHOULD A DISPUTE ARISE BETWEEN THE PARTIES TO THIS AGREE- MENT, SUCH DISPUTE SHALL BE REFERRED TO MEDIATION. ALL DISPUTES, W/C ARE NOT RESOLVED THROUGH MEDIAT- ION, SHALL BE SUBMITTED TO BINDING ARBITRATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELCH, MICHAEL T.
